Introducing

B.L.A.K.E.

Brand Life AI Knowledge Engine. The adaptive intelligence at the heart of RoweOS. Not just an assistant. An entity that learns, adapts, and embodies who you are.

Discover
What B.L.A.K.E. Stands For
B
Brand
Five specialized agents that don't just know about your brand. They become it. Strategy, Marketing, Operations, Documents, and Intelligence working as one.
L
Life
Personal coaching, wellness tracking, goal setting, and daily optimization. BLAKE adapts from business intelligence to personal companion seamlessly.
A
AI
Multi-model intelligence across Claude, GPT, and Gemini. BLAKE chooses the right mind for every task. Deep reasoning, creative generation, or web-connected research.
K
Knowledge
Identity memory, conversation history, brand context, and deep research. BLAKE accumulates understanding over time, growing sharper the more you work together.
E
Engine
150+ operations, autonomous scheduling, multi-step pipelines, social publishing, and email campaigns. The execution layer that turns intelligence into action.
Two Minds, One Intelligence
BrandAI + LifeAI = BLAKE
BLAKE is the overarching intelligence that unifies your professional and personal worlds. Two modes, one adaptive entity that knows when to think like a strategist and when to think like a coach.
BrandAI
Five specialized agents that embody your brand identity. Manage content strategy, run deep research, maintain voice consistency, and operate across your entire portfolio.
Strategy Marketing Operations Documents Intelligence
LifeAI
Five personal coaches for life management, wellness, finances, and daily optimization. Your private AI companion that adapts to your personal rhythms and goals.
Life Coach Wellness Tax Copilot Personal AI Standard AI
BrandAI + LifeAI = B.L.A.K.E.
One adaptive intelligence that shifts between professional strategy and personal coaching. Your brand knowledge informs your life decisions. Your life context enriches your brand.
Make BLAKE Yours
Shape & Color
BLAKE's visual form is entirely yours to customize. Choose a shape, pick your colors, and watch your intelligence come to life.
Crystal
Shape
Color
Secondary
What BLAKE Can Do
Intelligence in Action
From ideation to execution, BLAKE powers every layer of your workflow.
Contextual Chat
Conversations that remember your brand identity, past interactions, and strategic context across every session.
Studio Operations
150+ pre-built operations across strategy, marketing, content, video, and brand-specific workflows.
Deep Research
Multi-step analysis with web-connected intelligence for market research, competitive analysis, and strategic insight.
Autonomous Scheduling
Workflows and pipelines that run on your cadence. BLAKE executes while you sleep.
Social & Email
Publish to X, Instagram, and Threads. Full email client with AI composition and branded templates.
Bloom Feed
AI-generated content ideas tailored to each brand. Swipeable cards for social, images, video, and long-form.
Multi-Model
Claude, GPT, and Gemini. BLAKE selects the optimal model per task, or lets you choose. No lock-in.
Sovereign Data
Your intelligence stays yours. Browser-native, API keys never leave your device. No vendor lock-in.
Cross-Device
Firebase sync across desktop, tablet, and mobile. BLAKE travels with you.
Endlessly Adaptable
BLAKE Grows With You
The more you use BLAKE, the more it understands. Brand identity, personal preferences, and strategic context, all accumulating into deeper intelligence.
15
Brand Portfolios
Each with its own voice, identity, strategy, and agent configuration.
150+
Operations
Pre-built workflows spanning strategy, content, research, and execution.
10
AI Agents
Five brand agents and five life coaches, each with specialized intelligence.
Meet Your Intelligence
BLAKE is waiting. Start with a conversation, build your brand identity, and watch your AI entity come to life.
